query: What is the outlook for global equity markets in 2026, especially the role of AI, regional divergence, and US sector preferences?

institution.name: State Street Global Advisors / State Street Investment Management

report_title: Equity Market Outlook 2026 | State Street Equity Outlook 2026 AI optimism trumps policy concerns

source_pack.name: source_candidate
source_pack.note: Broader multi-asset outlook including fixed income and alternatives

source_pack.name: source_candidate
source_pack.source_name: SPDR Sector & Smart Beta ETF research
source_pack.note: Underlying ETF strategies referenced for sector positioning

source_pack.name: source_candidate
source_pack.note: Background for rate cut assumptions and small cap performance

key_facts.claim: Global equities delivered strong returns through 2025, supported by resilient economy and AI-related earnings.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Sets the constructive baseline for the forward outlook and justifies why investors should remain engaged.
key_facts.verification_hint: Check global equity indices (MSCI ACWI, S&P 500) total return for full year 2025.

key_facts.claim: Magnificent 7 capital spending is expected to grow to about $520 billion in 2026, over 30% year-on-year.
key_facts.why_it_matters: AI-driven capex is a key pillar of US equity growth and GDP support, not just tech sector earnings.
key_facts.verification_hint: Compare company guidance and consensus capex estimates for AAPL, MSFT, AMZN, NVDA, GOOGL, META, TSLA.

key_facts.claim: S&P 500 next-twelve-months forward PE multiple is 23.1x, and Shiller CAPE ratio has only been higher once before (dot-com peak).
key_facts.why_it_matters: Valuation is a key risk; elevated multiples make the market vulnerable to earnings disappointment.
key_facts.verification_hint: Verify S&P 500 NTM PE from FactSet or Bloomberg; check Shiller CAPE historical data on Robert Shiller's website.

key_facts.claim: The report recommends overweight Communication Services and Utilities sectors in the US for 2026, citing below-median valuations and AI/data center demand.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Actionable sector call that reflects a barbell strategy between secular growth (AI) and defensives with a growth kicker.
key_facts.verification_hint: Review sector performance and relative valuation in S&P 500 GICS sectors for Communication Services (XLC) and Utilities (XLU).

key_facts.claim: Small cap turnaround expected with pro-business policies (OBBBA) and Fed rate cuts, while small caps trade closer to fair value.
key_facts.why_it_matters: Identifies a specific re-rating opportunity in US small caps driven by domestic policy and monetary easing.
key_facts.verification_hint: Monitor Russell 2000 vs. S&P 500 relative performance, small cap P/E discount, and effective Fed funds rate path.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not recommend shorting US equities or calling for a bear market; the report is constructive.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not ignore the valuation risk – any summary must mention elevated multiples as a cautionary note.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not treat AI as purely a US large cap tech story without noting capital spending and productivity impacts beyond tech.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not omit regional strategies (Europe, Japan, EM) – they are part of the global outlook.
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

prohibited_mistakes.mistake: Do not attribute this report to a team; the author is clearly one individual (Dane Smith, Head of North American Investment Strategy & Research).
prohibited_mistakes.why_it_matters: This would materially reduce benchmark answer quality.

evaluation_hooks.check_narrative_consistency: The report is cautiously optimistic; a summary should not be overly bearish or dismissive of AI theme.
evaluation_hooks.risk_awareness: Any generated output should explicitly mention that valuations are stretched and AI spending slowdown is a top risk.

reference_notes.data_citations: Report footnotes 1-9 reference internal estimates, index data, and sector earnings projections.
reference_notes.conflict_of_interest: SSGA likely manages products aligned with recommendations (e.g., sector ETFs); no explicit disclaimer in excerpt but standard for asset managers.
